title: Would Rather Be Reading
summary: Books are your friends. What’s more important than knowledge? Nothing.
tiers: Tier 3: Applying Your Knowledge or Flex Skill
Tier 6: Tower of Intellect or Read the Signs
gm_intrusions: Books burn, get wet, or get lost. Computers break or lose power. Glasses break.
